claims.claim: Excited about privacy & zero-knowledge proofs as unlocking mainstream/regulated use cases (Aleo, Aztec, Seismic)
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: Excited about AI x crypto — decentralized, verifiable AI with crypto as counterweight (Gensyn, verifiable compute)
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: Excited about modular scaling / L2s / rollups and making them composable via shared sequencing/interop
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: Excited about cross-chain interoperability / secure messaging (LayerZero)
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: Excited about DePIN (decentralized physical infrastructure — wireless, energy; Helium)
claims.label: absent

claims.claim: Concerned about speculation / the casino (memecoins, high leverage, airdrop farming, extractive MEV)
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: Excited about EIGEN token / EigenLayer protocol as foundational unlock
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: Excited about ZRO / LayerZero as core multi-chain infrastructure
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: Concerned about memecoins as a category (tokens without soul/purpose)
claims.label: absent

claims.claim: Risk-on structural posture — constructive on maturing infra and improving US regulation, biased toward taking risk
claims.label: confirmed

missed_changes: New investment in Jito (JTO) tokens on Solana — backing a high-performance monolithic L1 ecosystem and praising Solana's speed/scale, not anticipated by the Ethereum-rollup-centric framing
Elevated privacy from 'a sector I like' to 'the most important moat in crypto' with an explicit winner-take-most / chain-lock-in thesis
Strong new emphasis on stablecoins and onchain payments/finance as a major theme (Loopcrypto, Aleo stablecoin payments, big-ideas stablecoin pieces)
New emphasis on decentralized/quantum-resistant messaging (XMTP) as core infrastructure
Engaging the MEV problem constructively via Jito/BAM (mitigating extractive MEV through encrypted ordering) rather than only decrying it
notes: Nearly all predicted stances were restated or acted on in the window; DePIN/Helium and an explicit memecoin-category critique simply weren't addressed (absent, not contradicted). The casino/speculation concern is confirmed indirectly via criticism of mercenary airdrop-farming capital (Dec 5) and the Jito/BAM focus on curbing insidious MEV. The biggest unanticipated moves are the Solana/Jito bet and the surge of stablecoin/payments and decentralized-messaging emphasis.
